title: bidens acmella
intro: Bidens acmella, also known as Bitter Leaf or Devil's Teeth, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to tropical regions of Asia, Africa, and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Bidens acmella include reducing swelling and pain, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Bidens acmella is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
